name: mem0
description: Long-term memory backed by a self-hosted mem0 server: the brain can save durable facts and recall them across conversations.

configSchema.label: mem0 endpoint
configSchema.hint: Base URL of the mem0 REST server, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:3401

configSchema.label: API key
configSchema.hint: mem0 API key (sent as x-api-key). Leave empty if the server runs without auth.

configSchema.label: Owner memory id
configSchema.hint: The mem0 user id for the OWNER's memories (default: orca). Other senders get their own memory automatically — linked accounts by Elowen username, unknown platform senders by platform id.
